title: The Orphanage
tmdbOverview: A woman brings her family back to her childhood home, which used to be an orphanage, intent on reopening it. Before long, her son starts to communicate with a new invisible friend.
synopsis: Released in 2007, The Orphanage is a horror, drama and thriller film from France and Spain. It holds a solid 7.4 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2000s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
